name: OCULUS INC.
summary: Oculus Inc. (OVTZ) is a Canadian-based development-stage technology company headquartered in Vancouver, BC, focused on cyber security, data privacy, and data protection solutions for enterprise customers. Its principal products include the Forget-Me-Yes (FMY) SaaS platform for Right-to-be-Forgotten compliance under GDPR, CCPA, LGPD, and other regulations, the ComplyTrust SaaS Suite (CTSS) for cloud-native data governance, and the legacy Cloud Document Protection System (Cloud-DPS) using digital watermarking for tamper-proof document authentication.
